channel.title: GitHub TeX Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of TeX in GitHub

item.title: dendibakh/perf-book
item.description: The book "Performance Analysis and Tuning on Modern CPU"

item.title: lervag/vimtex
item.description: VimTeX: A modern Vim and neovim filetype plugin for LaTeX files.

item.title: posquit0/Awesome-CV
item.description: 📄 Awesome CV is LaTeX template for your outstanding job application

item.title: Wandmalfarbe/pandoc-latex-template
item.description: A pandoc LaTeX template to convert markdown files to PDF or LaTeX.

item.title: zhanwen/MathModel
item.description: 研究生数学建模，本科生数学建模、数学建模竞赛优秀论文，数学建模算法，LaTeX论文模板，算法思维导图，参考书籍，Matlab软件教程，PPT

item.title: openmlsys/openmlsys-zh
item.description: 《Machine Learning Systems: Design and Implementation》- Chinese Version

item.title: dnl-blkv/mcdowell-cv
item.description: A Nice-looking CV template made into LaTeX

item.title: sanjib-sen/WebLaTex
item.description: A complete alternative for Overleaf with VSCode + Web + Git Integration + Copilot + Grammar & Spell Checker + Live Collaboration Support. Based on GitHub Codespace and Dev container.

item.title: the-turing-way/the-turing-way
item.description: Host repository for The Turing Way: a how to guide for reproducible data science
